0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Configuration"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne is configured via environment variables and (in Hermes Agent) through ",["$","code",null,{"children":"config.yaml"}],". All settings have sensible defaults so you can get started with zero configuration."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Constructor Parameters"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["The only runtime parameters are passed directly to the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne()"}]," constructor:"]}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne(\n    session_id=\"my-agent\",   # (optional)\n)\n"}]}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Parameter"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Type"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"session_id"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"str"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"\"default\""}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Session 12:["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne uses ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5"}]," via fastembed (384 dimensions) for local embedding generation. No external API key is needed."]}]

16:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"LLM Configuration (Sleep Summarization)"}]
17:["$","p",null,{"children":"The sleep cycle uses an LLM to summarize grouped working memories before promoting them to episodic memory. Can run locally or via an external API."}]
18:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Variable"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Default"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_ENABLED"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"true"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Enable filename for local API URL when primary remote LLM fails"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_FALLBACK_API_KEY"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"API key for fallback LLM endpoint"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_FALLBACK_MODELS"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Comma-separated fallback model names"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_FORCE_LOCAL"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"false"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Skip remote LLM and use local model directly"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_CONFLICT_DETECTION"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"false"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Enable LLM-based conflict detection during sleep"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_CONFLICT_LLM_BASE_URL"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"—"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"API conflict detection LLM calls"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_HOST_LLM_ENABLED"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"false"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Route 19:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Entity & Fact Extraction"}]

29:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Related Pages"}]
2a:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","a",null,{"href":"/getting-started/installation","children":"Installation Guide"}]," — Complete installation instructions"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","a",null,{"href":"/getting-started/first-steps","children":"First Steps"}]," — Storing memories, querying, understanding tiers"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","a",null,{"href":"/operations/performance","children":"Performance Tuning"}]," — Index tuning, query optimization, WAL mode settings"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","a",null,{"href":"/operations/sync","children":"Sync Documentation"}]," — Bidirectional sync protocol and deployment"]}],"\n"]}]
2b:["$","p",null,{"children":["| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_DATA_DIR"}]," | ~/.hermes/mnemosyne/data | Directory for database, logs, models, and stats |\n| | Max seconds for auto-sleep cycle |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SHUTDOWN_DRAIN_TIMEOUT"}]," | 2 | Max seconds to drain LLM queue on shutdown |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SLEEP_PROMPT"}]," |  | Custom prompt for sleep LLM consolidation |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER2_DAYS"}]," | 30 | Days before memories enter Tier 2 (compressed) |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER3_DAYS"}]," | 180 | Days before memories enter Tier 3 (summary only) |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER1_WEIGHT"}]," | 1.0 | Scoring weight for Tier 1 (fresh) memories |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER2_WEIGHT"}]," | 0.5 | Scoring weight for Tier 2 (compressed) memories |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER3_WEIGHT"}]," | 0.25 | Scoring weight for Tier 3 (summary) memories |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_DEGRADE_BATCH"}]," | 100 | Batch size for tiered degradation pass |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_SMART_COMPRESS"}]," | true | Use LLM for smart tiered compression instead of truncation |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TIER3_MAX_CHARS"}]," | 300 | Max character length for Tier 3 summaries |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_STATED_WEIGHT"}]," | 1.0 | Veracity weight for stated (user-asserted) memories |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_INFERRED_WEIGHT"}]," | 0.7 | Veracity weight for inferred (LLM-extracted) memories |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_TOOL_WEIGHT"}]," | 0.5 | Veracity weight for tool-returned memories |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_IMPORTED_WEIGHT"}]," | 0.6 | Veracity weight for externally imported memories |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_UNKNOWN_WEIGHT"}]," | 0.8 | Veracity weight for memories with unknown source |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_VEC_TYPE"}]," | int8 | Vector storage format (int8, float32, float16, binary) |\n| ","$L31"," | BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5 | fastembed model for vector embeddings |\n| ","$L32"," | 384 | Override embedding vector dimension |\n| ","$L33"," |  | API key for cloud embedding provider |\n| ","$L34"," | ","$L35"," | API endpoint for cloud embeddings |\n| ","$L36"," | false | Disable dense vector retrieval entirely |\n| ","$L37"," | false | Force cloud API mode for embeddings |\n| ","$L38"," |  | Local fastembed model for API fallback (v3.6.0) |\n| ","$L39"," | 0.5 | Vector similarity weight in hybrid ranking |\n| ","$L3a"," | 0.3 | Full-text search weight in hybrid ranking |\n| ","$L3b"," | 0.2 | Importance score weight in hybrid ranking |\n| ","$L3c"," | true | Enable LLM summarization during sleep consolidation |\n| ","$L3d"," |  | OpenAI-compatible API base URL for remote LLM |\n| ","$L3e"," |  | API key for remote LLM endpoint |\n| ","$L3f"," |  | Model identifier for remote LLM calls |\n| ","$L40"," | 2048 | Max output tokens per LLM summary |\n| ","$L41"," | 2048 | Context window size for local LLM |\n| ","$L42"," | 4 | CPU threads for local LLM inference |\n| ","$L43"," | openbmb/MiniCPM5-1B-GGUF | HuggingFace repo for GGUF model |\n| ","$L44"," | MiniCPM5-1B-Q4_K_M.gguf | GGUF filename for local LLM |\n| ","$L45"," |  | Fallback API URL when primary remote LLM fails |\n| ","$L46"," |  | API key for fallback LLM endpoint |\n| ","$L47"," |  | Comma-separated fallback model names to try |\n| ","$L48"," | false | Skip remote LLM and use local model directly |\n| ","$L49"," | false | Enable LLM-based conflict detection during sleep |\n| ","$L4a"," |  | API base URL for conflict detection LLM |\n| ","$L4b"," |  | API key for conflict detection LLM |\n| ","$L4c"," |  | Model for conflict detection LLM calls |\n| ","$L4d"," | false | Route consolidation through host-provided LLM adapter |\n| ","$L4e"," |  | Model override for host LLM adapter |\n| ","$L4f"," |  | Provider override for host LLM adapter (e.g. openai-codex) |\n| ","$L50"," | 32000 | Context window budget when using host LLM adapter |\n| ","$L51"," | google/gemini-2.5-flash | Model for entity/fact extraction via OpenRouter |\n| ","$L52"," |  | Custom prompt for entity/fact extraction |\n| ","$L53"," | false | Enable BEAM benchmark optimizations (feature flag) |\n| ","$L54"," | 0 | Enable enhanced recall pipeline (fact+graph+episodic fusion) |\n| ","$L55"," | 0 | Enable fact-based recall (backward compat alias) |\n| ","$L56"," | 0 | Enable polyphonic recall engine (multi-voice fusion) |\n| ","$L57"," | 0 | Enable proactive cross-memory linking on insertion |\n| ","$L58"," | 1 | A/B toggle: graph traversal bonus in recall scoring |\n| ","$L59"," | 1 | A/B toggle: fact match bonus in recall scoring |\n| ","$L5a"," | 1 | A/B toggle: binary vector bonus in recall scoring |\n| ","$L5b"," | false | Use substring instead of exact match for fact recall |\n| ","$L5c"," | 1 | A/B toggle: apply veracity multiplier to recall scores |\n| ","$L5d"," | 1 | A/B toggle: cross-tier deduplication in BEAM recall |\n| ","$L5e"," | 1 | A/B toggle: polyphonic vector voice (Phase 3d) |\n| ","$L5f"," | 1 | A/B toggle: polyphonic graph voice (Phase 3b) |\n| ","$L60"," | 1 | A/B toggle: polyphonic fact voice (Phase 3a) |\n| ","$L61"," | 1 | A/B toggle: polyphonic temporal voice (Phase 3c) |\n| ","$L62"," | false | Enable BEAM mode (polyphonic recall engine extension) |\n| ","$L63"," | false | Use caveman/AAAK encoding fallback for consolidation |\n| ","$L64"," | user | Conversation roles to sync into memory; default user-only to avoid assistant transcript noise |\n| ","$L65"," | cron,flush,subagent,background,skill_loop | Comma-separated context names to skip |\n| ","$L66"," | 500 | Max chars of user content synced per turn (0=no limit) |\n| ","$L67"," | 800 | Max chars of assistant content synced per turn (0=no limit) |\n| ","$L68"," | 0 | Truncate prefetched content to N chars (0=no truncation) |\n| ","$L69"," | user,owner,assistant,agent,system,profile,identity,default | Comma/space-separated local owner/system words that should not by themselves make canonical facts relevant |\n| ","$L6a"," |  | Comma/space-separated extra lexical stopwords for local recall corpora |\n| ","$L6b"," | general | Prefetch profile name (general, coding, etc.) |\n| ","$L6c"," |  | Bearer token for MCP server auth (required for remote deployment) |\n| ","$L6d"," | default | Default MCP bank name for tool operations |\n| ","$L6e"," |  | Identifier for the author/agent creating memories |\n| ","$L6f"," |  | Type of author (user, assistant, system, etc.) |\n| ","$L70"," |  | Channel/session identifier for memory scoping |\n| ","$L71"," | default | Default owner for canonical facts and shared memory |\n| ","$L72"," | 50 | Max memories per SHMR reorganization batch |\n| ","$L73"," | 3 | Max SHMR clustering iterations per batch |\n| ","$L74"," | 0.70 | Cosine similarity threshold for memory clustering |\n| ","$L75"," | 0.60 | Harmony threshold for cluster merging |\n| ","$L76"," |  | LLM model for SHMR summarization (empty = use default) |\n| ","$L77"," | 2 | Minimum memories to form a SHMR cluster |\n| ","$L78"," | 0.2 | LLM temperature for SHMR summarization |"]}]
